newsitems.title: Announcing Happy's Humble BURGATORY🍔
newsitems.author: GYK | tinyBuild
newsitems.contents: {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/d3210bc768650d0c68a3d0394b8114201faf40b4.gif Night crew, time to clock in! Time to enter... 🍔Happy's Humble BURGATORY BURGATORY 🔊 /ˈbɝ:.ɡə.tɔ:r.i/ : an off-the-rails co-op cooking horror game. Think Burger Farm, but with cooking and serving alongside other players. You and your mates are part of an experiment by the Paragon Corporation. It sounds easy: do some good ol' burger flippin' and call it a day. But easy it is NOT, buddy. Fail to hit your quota, and you're cooked, courtesy of Asset Joy. Check out this freshj gameplay vid, straight from the oven: Happy's Humble BURGATORY is arriving on July 16th. Wishlist this shit right now: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3453910/ {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/478e6c03dbbb3fd6aecc2997b1071b6ab566b024.png {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/2b2bb820941df6c37c59e21d060bc3bb9588dff2.png {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/607aac7f04aab3bc8bc4ce5813790f1c6d4f3573.png {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/8534fc6783e963c55f9f94b4af041a81ae959972.png Hold on, that's not all. We’ve got a little something for y'all to celebrate the announcement - on the house, baby! Claim our previous game, Happy's Humble Burger Farm, before June 15th... ...to keep it in your library forever: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1433340/Happys_Humble_Burger_Farm/ More news soon! {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/0527752503a1b24cf8afc2858eaae0d5dbe13323.png {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39014501/a2e62e4708a175e74de5d54c96c7d421fc337c6e.png
